column1: Input,Fraction of Crop Residues Burned,frac_residues_burned,"
column2: Fraction of residues burned.
**Behavioral Note**: whatever is not removed or burned is assumed to be left as inputs to crops. Includes bagasse/sugar cane tops (sugar cane residue).

**Behavioral Note**: Total of **Fraction of Crop Residues Burned**, **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Energy**, and **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Livestock Feed** must be less than or equal to 1.",``frac_agrc_crop_residues_burned_$CAT-AGRICULTURE$``,``cereals``

column1: Input,Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Energy,frac_residues_removed_for_energy,"
column2: Fraction of residues removed for energy use in electricity production.
**Behavioral Note**: if residues removed for energy are removed in excess of the amount required to satisfy electrictal production, they are sent to the solid waste stream.
**Behavioral Note**: whatever is not removed or burned is assumed to be left as inputs to crops. Includes bagasse/sugar cane tops (sugar cane residue).

**Behavioral Note**: Total of **Fraction of Crop Residues Burned**, **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Energy**, and **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Livestock Feed** must be less than or equal to 1.",``frac_agrc_crop_residues_removed_for_energy_$CAT-AGRICULTURE$````,``cereals``

column1: Input,Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Livestock Feed,frac_residues_removed_for_feed,"
column2: Fraction of residues removed for livestock feed.
**Behavioral Note**: if residues removed for livestock feed are removed in excess of the amount required to satisfy the maximum amount possible for livestock, they are sent to the solid waste stream.
**Behavioral Note**: whatever is not removed or burned is assumed to be left as inputs to crops. Includes bagasse/sugar cane tops (sugar cane residue).

**Behavioral Note**: Total of **Fraction of Crop Residues Burned**, **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Energy**, and **Fraction of Crop Residues Removed for Livestock Feed** must be less than or equal to 1.",``frac_agrc_crop_residues_removed_for_livestock_feed_$CAT-AGRICULTURE$````,``cereals``
